productDisplayName: W Women Gathered Design Pink Kurta
description: Composition Pink striped kurta made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, metal detailing, woven panel with stitch and gathered design on the chest, and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
